tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Part 1: Move test_forward_references.py to integration tests', 'status': 'co...[truncated 1058 chars]...ication'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8922 is implemented and PR submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8922
**Summary of changes:**
**Part 1 — Move `test_forward_references.py` to integration:** - Moved `tests/unit/test_forward_references.py` → `tests/integration/test_forward_references.py` (scans entire source tree, clearly integration-level I/O)
**Part 2 — Move real `create_context()` tests to integration:** - Extracted 3 tests that call real `create_context()` (git/config I/O) from `tests/unit/core/test_context.py` → `tests/integration/test_context.py` - Kept 4 fast tests using `context_for_test()` in unit
**Part 3 — Route `setup_cmd.py` through Codespace gateway:** - **ABC** (`codespace/abc.py`): Added `get_repo_id()` and `create_codespace()` abstract methods - **Real** (`codespace/real.py`): Implemented using `run_subprocess_with_context()` + `json.loads()` - **Fake** (`codespace/fake.py`): Added constructor params (`repo_id`, `created_codespace_name`) and mutation tracking - **setup_cmd.py**: Replaced `_get_repo_id()` helper, `run_with_error_reporting()`, and bare `subprocess.run()` with `ctx.codespace.get_repo_id()`, `ctx.codespace.create_codespace()`, and `ctx.codespace.run_ssh_command()` - **Tests**: Rewrote all tests with `FakeCodespace` — tests now exercise the full flow (11 tests, 4 new) with no subprocess calls
